title: The Harlem Globetrotters
actors: Harlem Globetrotters, Thomas Gomez, Dorothy Dandridge
plot: Abe Saperstein, owner/manager of the world-famous "Harlem Globetrotters", an all-Negro professional basketball team, signs Billy Townsend, an All-American, to play with the "Globetrotters." Saperstein wants Billy to finish school ...
